name: AWS SageMaker Unauthorized Code Repository Creation Detected
description: Monitors for unauthorized code repository creation in Amazon SageMaker, a key activity that could indicate an attacker attempting to establish or modify a development environment for malicious purposes. This could be used to deploy unauthorized code, exfiltrate data, or compromise machine learning environments.

rules.name: AWS SageMaker Unauthorized Code Repository Creation Detected

author: Sunil Bharti
